THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR FURTHER HEARING TO 12/14/10. RESPONDENT TO PRODUCE UNDISPUTED DOCUMENTS BY 12/7/10; PRODUCE PRIVILEGE LOG BY 12/10/10; TO FILE OPPOSITION BY 12/10/10. PETITIONER'S REPLY, IF ANY, TO BE FILED BY NOON ON 12/13/10. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR FURTHER BRIEFING. PARTIES ARE TO SUBMIT BRIEFS REGARDING GOVERNOR'S CORRESPONDENCE, AND LAY OUT THE AREAS OF DISAGREEMENT REGARDING WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGE OR ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE. BRIEFS ARE NOT TO EXCEED 10 PAGES, AND COURTESY COPIES ARE TO BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY JANUARY 6, 2011. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FROM DEC-14-2010 TO JAN-10-2011, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 504 TO BE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE WOOLARD. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For A Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing For A Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Continued To Jan-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION'S NOTICE OF HEARING FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE. Appearances: Michael T. Risher of the American Civil Liberties Union Foundation of Northern California (621.2493) for petitioner and moving party; Kelcie M. Gosling of Mennemeier Glassmand & Stroud LLP (916.551.2581) for respondent and opposing party. Parties discussed the matter of confidential documents. The court continued the matter for further briefing. Parties are to submit briefs regarding governor's correspondence, and lay out the areas of disagreement regarding work product privilege or attorney-client privilege. Briefs are not to exceed 10 pages, and courtesy copies are to be delivered to department 302 by January 6, 2011. The matter is continued to January 10, 2011 at 9:00 am in Department 504 to be heard before Judge Woolard. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Hearing For A Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Continued To Dec-14-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A WRIT OF MANDATE.

APPEARANCES: Michael T. Risher, Esq. of American Civil Liberties Union of Northern California 621-2493 for petitioner & moving party; Kelcie M. Gosling, Esq. of Mennemeier, Glassman & Stroud LLP 916/551-2581 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter for further hearing to 12/14/10. Respondent to produce undisputed documents by 12/7/10; produce privilege log by 12/10/10; to file opposition by 12/10/10. Petitioner's reply, if any, to be filed by noon on 12/13/10. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
